hypothesis: Active-learning fine-tuning of a pre-trained eSEN model using ≤100 variable-cell DFT-labeled SSNEB images with a stress-amplified loss will yield ML-only SSNEB pathways for CsPbI3 β→γ and TiO2-B→anatase whose energy barriers differ from VASP-only results by <0.05 eV while halving the required SSNEB iterations relative to the current ML-only baseline.
